name: Grinnell College
meets_full_need_notes: Grinnell meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted students, including international students.
no_loan_notes: Grinnell includes loans in aid packages for many students, though loan levels are moderate and grants are substantial. No universal no-loan policy.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid evaluation as RD applicants. Aid package provided with admission decision.
appeal_policy: Appeals reviewed for changed financial circumstances through Office of Student Financial Aid.
